mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_heartbeat_log ( account_id, country_code, api_url, check_time, check_result, response_code, exception_type, exception_msg, is_reconnect, reconnect_count, reconnect_result, create_time ) VALUES ( #{accountId}, #{countryCode}, #{apiUrl}, #{checkTime}, #{checkResult}, #{responseCode}, #{exceptionType}, #{exceptionMsg}, #{isReconnect}, #{reconnectCount}, #{reconnectResult}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_heartbeat_log WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND check_result = 1 AND check_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE)

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(reconnect_count), 0) FROM sys_heartbeat_log WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_reconnect = 1 AND check_time >= ( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(t2.check_time), '1970-01-01') FROM sys_heartbeat_log t2 WHERE t2.account_id = #{accountId} AND t2.check_result = 0 AND t2.is_reconnect = 0 )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_heartbeat_log WHERE check_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
